_synopsis.description: Prompt specification (not a runnable script) used to instruct an AI assistant or developer to consolidate three standalone scripts into a single unified workflow. Defines the execution order, analysis scope, configuration export requirements, and deliverables for the consolidation task.
_synopsis.intended_use: Feed this JSON to an AI coding assistant (e.g. Claude, Copilot) along with the three source scripts to generate the unified script and companion config file in one pass.

source_scripts.copy_tracking_folder.py: Copies and date-renames the latest tracking subfolder and renames .xlsx files by prefix
source_scripts.script-MUMI-TRACKING.py: Duplicates last COMMENTS column, preserves formatting, hides original — MUMI workbook
source_scripts.script-SURYA-MINES-TRACKING.py: Same column duplication operation — SURYA MINES workbook

execution_order: 2. run_mumi_tracking_update     — COMMENTS column duplication on MUMI file
3. run_surya_mines_tracking_update — COMMENTS column duplication on SURYA MINES file
deliverables: Unified Python script running all three steps in sequence
JSON configuration file externalising all hardcoded parameters
_synopsis.status: Prompt only — source scripts (copy_tracking_folder.py, script-MUMI-TRACKING.py, script-SURYA-MINES-TRACKING.py) must be supplied separately to execute the consolidation task.

objective: Consolidate three existing scripts into one unified workflow and export the consolidated logic as a JSON configuration file.

copy_tracking_folder.py.purpose: Copies the latest date-named subfolder (%d-%m-%Y) from a hardcoded base directory to a new subfolder named with the current date, then renames all .xlsx files in that folder based on hardcoded prefix mappings.

script-MUMI-TRACKING.py.purpose: Duplicates the last 'COMMENTS DD-MM-YYYY' column in a specific Excel file, preserves formatting, and hides the original column.

script-SURYA-MINES-TRACKING.py.purpose: Performs the same column duplication operation for a different Excel file.

execution_order.name: copy_and_rename
execution_order.description: Execute the copy and rename logic from copy_tracking_folder.py first.

execution_order.name: run_mumi_tracking_update
execution_order.description: After folder copy and rename, run the column duplication logic from script-MUMI-TRACKING.py on the appropriate renamed file in the new folder.

execution_order.name: run_surya_mines_tracking_update
execution_order.description: After the MUMI step, run the column duplication logic from script-SURYA-MINES-TRACKING.py on the appropriate renamed file in the new folder.

json_configuration_requirements.purpose: Document the consolidated workflow and all extracted hardcoded settings.
must_include: file mappings for each column-duplication operation

key_requirements: Match the existing code patterns from the uploaded scripts.
Preserve all existing functionality and error handling.
Target the renamed .xlsx files created during the copy-and-rename step.
Maintain all hardcoded configurations from the original scripts.
Handle errors gracefully and provide clear feedback on which step succeeded or failed.
Save all changes in place, as the original scripts do.
Generate the JSON configuration file alongside the unified script as documentation.
deliverables: One consolidated Python script that runs the full workflow in sequence.
One JSON configuration file documenting the workflow structure and all hardcoded parameters.
